source_mode.hint: auto tries the selected AstrBot provider first and then falls back to the plugin-local OpenAI-compatible settings.

astrbot_provider_id.hint: Used when source_mode is astrbot_provider or auto.

use_current_provider_when_empty.description: Use the current chat provider when provider ID is empty

image_model.hint: Example: gpt-image-1 or any model exposed by your image API.

generation_endpoint.hint: Can be a full URL or a relative path such as /images/generations.

edit_endpoint.hint: Used for continuity when the previous frame becomes the next reference image.

prefer_edit_for_continuity.description: Prefer image edit endpoint for continuity
prefer_edit_for_continuity.hint: If disabled or unsupported, the plugin will continue with text-only prompts.

max_frames.description: Maximum frame count allowed by the plugin
max_frames.hint: The runtime clamps the requested count to this value.

image_only_prompt.default: Continue the same scene with coherent characters, style, and motion.

show_reference_as_first_frame.description: Show the uploaded or quoted reference image as frame 1
show_reference_as_first_frame.hint: When enabled, a user-provided reference image is returned as the first frame and generation starts from frame 2.

allow_reply_image_as_reference.description: Allow replied image messages as reference input

show_generated_prompt.description: Show the actual prompt together with each frame

auto_plan_prompts.description: Use an LLM to auto-plan per-frame prompts
auto_plan_prompts.hint: If disabled or unavailable, the plugin falls back to deterministic continuity prompts.

prompt_planner_provider_id.hint: Optional. Leave empty to reuse the current chat provider.

use_current_provider_for_prompt_planner.description: Reuse the current chat provider for prompt planning when planner provider is empty

prompt_planner_model.hint: Optional. Leave empty to use the planner provider default model.

planner_use_image_context.description: Send the previous frame image to the prompt planner when possible
planner_use_image_context.hint: Requires the planner provider to support image understanding.

prompt_output_language.hint: English is usually safer for image APIs.
